name: 06_Sentiment_Analysis_SVM_Sentiment140_ML
query: Tafadhali nisaidie kujenga mfumo wa uchambuzi wa hisia kwenye tweets ukitumia seti ya data ya Sentiment140 inayopatikana kutoka Hugging Face. Pakia seti ya data ya Sentiment140 na, wakati wa kupakia data, isafishe kwa kuondoa maneno ya kusimama, alama za uandishi, na herufi maalum, yote katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia Word2Vec au GloVe kwa uvektaishaji wa maandishi. Hii inapaswa kufanyika katika `src/data_loader.py`. Kisha, tekeleza na funza kisanidi cha SVM katika `src/model.py`. Mwishowe, andika ripoti ya usahihi wa kisanidi kwenye `results/metrics/accuracy_score.txt`. Kwa kawaida, ripoti inapaswa kuwa rahisi kufasiri.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Sentiment140," inayopatikana kutoka "Hugging Face," inapatikana katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Seti ya data inasafishwa, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa maneno ya kusimama, alama za uandishi, na herufi maalum, yote katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uwekaji wa maneno, ama "Word2Vec" au "GloVe," unatumika kubadilisha maandishi kuwa vekta katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Kisanidi cha "SVM" kinatekelezwa na kufunzwa katika `src/model.py`.
Alama ya usahihi inachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/accuracy_score.txt`.

preferences.criteria: Mchakato wa kupakua seti ya data unapaswa kuwa wa kuaminika, na uwe na utunzaji wa makosa wazi.
Ripoti ya mwisho ya usahihi inapaswa kuwa rahisi na rahisi kufasiri.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Sentiment140," inayopatikana kutoka "Hugging Face," inapatikana katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The requirement is not met. Based on the provided content of `src/data_loader.py`, the file contains only a minimal placeholder function (`load_dataset`) and a list of requirement strings, but it lacks any actual implementation or code to fetch the "Sentiment140" dataset from Hugging Face. Furthermore, the trajectory evidence confirms that attempts to load the dataset failed due to a `ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'datasets'` and an "Execution Timeout," indicating that the necessary library was not installed and the data retrieval process was never successfully completed.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The requirement is not met. Based on the provided content of `src/data_loader.py`, the file contains only minimal placeholders and documentation strings (`Minimal dataset loader placeholder`, `build_transforms`) rather than any functional implementation of Word2Vec or GloVe. 

While the "Trajectory Evidence" mentions attempts to use Word2Vec or GloVe, the actual source code provided for `src/data_loader.py` lacks the necessary imports (such as `gensim` or `numpy`), logic for loading embedding files, or the mathematical implementation to convert text into vectors. The code provided is a skeleton that lists the requirements in a string variable `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` but does not execute them. Additionally, the trajectory notes indicate that the execution failed due to missing resource files and memory errors, meaning a successful vectorization using these embeddings was never achieved in the final state.

judge_stats.criteria: Kisanidi cha "SVM" kinatekelezwa na kufunzwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

Kigezo hiki hakijatimizwa kwa sababu faili la `src/model.py` lililotolewa halina msimbo halisi wa kusanidi au kufunza kisanidi cha SVM (Support Vector Machine). Badala yake, faili hilo lina "placeholder" tu na maelezo ya kigezo (REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA). Ingawa maelezo ya trajectory yanataja kuwepo kwa `svm_model.pkl` na makosa ya `ConvergenceWarning`, msimbo halisi wa chanzo (source code) uliochunguzwa katika `src/model.py` hauna maktaba kama `sklearn.svm` wala mantiki ya mafunzo ya `.fit()`.

judge_stats.criteria: Alama ya usahihi inachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/accuracy_score.txt`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

Ingawa muundo wa mradi unaonyesha kuwepo kwa faili ya `results/metrics/accuracy_score.txt` na kumbukumbu za utekelezaji (trajectory) zinadai kuwa mchakato ulikamilika, maudhui halisi ya faili hiyo yaliyotolewa kwenye ushahidi wa mradi (`Content of Files`) ni `('placeholder\r\n', None)`. Hii inaonyesha kuwa alama halisi ya usahihi (accuracy score) haikukokotolewa au kuhifadhiwa, badala yake faili ina kishika-nafasi (placeholder) pekee.
